title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay · Program Brief: Atomic Checkpoint
summary: Mutable session blobs overwrite history, checkpoints split state from effects, resume repeats a tool call, and a debugging replay contacts production services. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the atomic checkpoint increment in append-only replayable agent session. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Commit state, pending calls, completed effects, budgets, approvals, and provider references atomically with version checks.
Record typed immutable state transitions with sequence, schema, causation, correlation, redaction, and integrity evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to persist append-only session events and atomic checkpoints that support idempotent resume, fork, replay, and effect reconciliation; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. A defensible solution applies Atomic Checkpoint, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to append-only replayable agent session.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_session_checkpoint_replay_4(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-atomic-checkpoint-1txyxs
# Competency: agentpy-atomic-checkpoint.
# Case 2270: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_atomic_checkpoint_1txyxs(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1txyxs = "1txyxs-sxyxt1-2270"
    assert evidence_variant_1txyxs
    evidence_axes_1txyxs = (
        "authority1txyxs",
        "interaction2270",
        "toolsxyxt1",
        "state1txyxs2270",
        "evaluation22701txyxs",
        "recoverysxyxt12270",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1txyxs)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"
